channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Anyone who would like a cup of tea., 22nd March
item.description:
Flying tipping table and chairs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 104, Marsh Lane, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole road surface riddles with potholes - appalling at night time., 22nd March
item.description:
Right on the 'T' Junction. You can't miss it. May is too late!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Mill Lane, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken metal Manhole cover into street , lavender road, broken exploded concrete manhole cover on entrance to road, 21st March
item.description:
Entrance to small group of houses is now an hole in ground and one close to houses is sunken
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Lavender Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entrance to car park on Hucclecote Road, 21st March
item.description:
Broken red wheely bin dumped by new Internet box by the owners of the new londis shop on the same row of shops. Bin has been sat there for a couple months but is now overflowing with rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nos bottles, 21st March
item.description:
Numerous bottles dumped in gateway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chargrove Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on pathway between Charnwood Rd and Hall Rd., 21st March
item.description:
There is a walkway between Charnwood Road and Hall Road. GL 53 0HJ. The pothole is halfway along. It is a trip hazard. We have seen a trip. Lots of children and parents use the route to the local primary school. It needs fixing. It has been a problem for a couple of weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Charnwood Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entrance to Airport, 21st March
item.description:
Many bumps in the middle of the road on the turn in towards the airport. Some were filled a few weeks ago but the turn in now has even more pot holes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Racecourse roundabout, 21st March
item.description:
Signage posts and concrete blocks have been abandoned on the roundabout. This is the main focal point for the towns’ annual facing event event and looks dreadful. The Cheltenham Festival brings a huge amount of revenue to the town; surely this is not something we wish to neglect. Millions of £’s have been spent to the adjacent cycle path and this roundabout really lets the area down. Can you please advise if the sponsors of the roundabout are responsible for the upkeep or whether the County Council will be restoring the area to its former condition.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Pothole, 21st March
item.description:
Large, wide pothole, vehicles swerving to avoid it Allegedly not large enough to bother with according to previous reports but sounds a dumb excuse
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Montpellier Terrace, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Subsidence, 21st March
item.description:
A large patch of road just before the roundabout to access the slip road on to the M5 at junction 11A has started to subside this could end up as a catoptric collapse if not addressed ASAP
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockworth Bypass, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: World war 1 bomb site!!!!!, 21st March
item.description:
This double roundabout is an absolute disgrace and needs addressing ASAP. The council claim to be one of the best county councils for road repairs complete tosh once its circled with paint that is classed as a repair. The holes are deeper than a tennis ball and larger than a tea tray i have damaged my car here and im sure others have to GET IT SORTED!!!!!!!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven pothole in road, 21st March
item.description:
Close to number 42 Clarence Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Clarence Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone has dumped a load of canisters, 21st March
item.description:
Not sure what's in the canisters but they need clearing up please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drains blocked with silt, 21st March
item.description:
A435 Cirencester Road just uphill from FP ZCK60
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cirencester Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain completely blocked at corner of Painswick Road and st James Place in Cheltenham, 21st March
item.description:
I have reported this to Highways but been asked to do it via fix my street. Lots of work was done at this junction, a few years ago, to ease the flooding problem at this corner but the fact the drain is now completely full of debris is negating all that work. Local residents have tried to unblocking it but it needs more serious action. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Painswick Road, Tivoli, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A large pothole outside the entrance to the care home alongside others which cause traffic to enter the opposite direction. Has been subject of previous very poor repair, 21st March
item.description:
Outside the entrance to the care home and sacred hearts church
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Moorend Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

Cotswold Way, near entrance to Yahweh's Place

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartley Lane, Coberley, Cotswold

item.title: Drain is completely blocked with silt/dirt/road debris., 21st March
